allow: PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; node --version; npm --version; Write-Output "PATH 등록 완료")
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 35)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "상태코드: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "내전 만들기"\) { Write-Output "✓ '내전 만들기' 렌더링 확인" }; if \($r.Content -match "참가자 선택"\) { Write-Output "✓ '참가자 선택' 렌더링 확인" }; if \($r.Content -match "페이커"\) { Write-Output "✓ 샘플 선수 렌더링 확인" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/verify" -UseBasicParsing; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; foreach \($s in $j.scenarios\) { Write-Output "=== $\($s.name\) ==="; Write-Output \("선수 점수: " + \($s.players -join ', '\)\); Write-Output \("최적   - 블루:$\($s.best.blueTotal\) 레드:$\($s.best.redTotal\) 전력차:$\($s.best.scoreDiff\) 포지션:$\($s.best.positionFit\)"\); Write-Output \("최악\(참고\) 전력차:$\($s.worst.scoreDiff\)"\); Write-Output "" })
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 12)
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force ".next" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 22)

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\s2071\\.claude\\projects\\c--Users-s2071-Desktop----"; if \(Test-Path $dir\) { Write-Output "세션 폴더: $dir"; Get-ChildItem $dir -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "--- 하위 폴더 ---"; Get-ChildItem $dir -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name } else { Write-Output "세션 폴더 없음" })
